commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=29e4b7438e43451e1054a4961c90628ec70b63d9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps `requestDiscord` success-response JSON parsing in `DiscordApiError` handling and adds a malformed JSON regression test.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +18. Total +25 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows a mocked 200 Discord API response with malformed body text reaches `JSON.parse(text)` in `requestDiscord` on current main; I did not execute tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The code cleanup is mechanical, but missing contributor-owned real behavior proof makes this a human/contributor follow-up rather than a safe repair-lane item.

target.title: fix(discord): guard JSON.parse against malformed API response bodies
target.author: lsr911

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
